scripts.start:all: for dir in dashboard signal-scanner email-scan research contact-research outreach-drafter scorer gmail-hygiene podcast-monitor; do (cd $dir && node server.js >> /tmp/jsa-$dir.log 2>&1 &); done && echo 'All agents started. Logs in /tmp/jsa-*.log'
scripts.health: for PORT in 3030 3033 3034 3035 3036 3037 3038 3039 3040; do STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://localhost:$PORT 2>/dev/null); NAMES='3030:Dashboard 3033:Signal-Scanner 3034:Email-Scan 3035:Research 3036:Contact-Research 3037:Outreach-Drafter 3038:Scorer 3039:Gmail-Hygiene 3040:Podcast-Monitor'; NAME=$(echo $NAMES | tr ' ' '\n' | grep ^$PORT: | cut -d: -f2); echo "Port $PORT ($NAME): $STATUS"; done
scripts.stop:all: for PORT in 3030 3033 3034 3035 3036 3037 3038 3039 3040; do PID=$(lsof -ti :$PORT 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$PID" ]; then kill $PID && echo "Stopped port $PORT (PID $PID)"; fi; done && echo 'All agents stopped.'
